name: sail
description: Build, instrument, and debug Sail Voyage observability flows with series history, Sail inference attribution, and Sailbox execution evidence — plus the sail-delegate MCP server and fanout policy for offloading heavy coding/analysis work to GLM workers on Sail.

interface.longDescription: Build, instrument, and debug Sail Voyage observability flows with series history, Sail inference attribution, and Sailbox execution evidence — plus the sail-delegate MCP server and fanout policy for offloading heavy coding/analysis work to GLM workers on Sail.
